# ioprodz

> I turn ChatGPT wrappers into real products — on sovereign AI, shipped daily, without the slop.

Independent engineering consultancy based in France, founded late 2025 by Osmane Kalache. ioprodz is the counter-voice to AI slop: a practice focused on turning ChatGPT wrappers into real products through engineering maturity — daily releases, sovereign AI infrastructure, and the boring engineering work every AI tutorial skips.

## What Osmane does

- Turns ChatGPT-wrapper MVPs, vibe-coded prototypes, and legacy codebases into production-grade AI products in ~90 days
- Installs model-agnostic AI infrastructure: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Grok, or local open-weight models, scoped per feature, no vendor lock-in
- Wires AI into the engine room (internal tooling, docs, refactors, metrics) before pointing it at end users
- Coaches teams on TDD, DDD, XP, CI/CD, fast feedback loops, and the practices that make AI features survive production

## The thesis

By 2028, most B2B SaaS will be 90% autonomous. The teams reaching that future are the ones installing engineering maturity today — not the ones stacking tokens. The humans on those teams won't write features; they'll validate results, govern designs, own SLAs, and spend their time with customers.

## Who ioprodz is for

- Non-technical founders or small technical teams who need an interim-CTO to translate AI strategy into a real roadmap
- Senior engineers leveling up into architecture or leadership who want to ship AI features without losing engineering craft

## What ioprodz is against

- Shipping more AI features just because "AI." Users can't keep up, products destabilize, trust craters.
- Token-grinding: frontier model providers profiting from half-baked features burning requests
- Vendor lock-in disguised as "best-in-class AI"
- The myth that AI-native means engineering-optional

## Services

- [Consulting / IT Strategy](/consulting/it-strategy): Interim CTO, technical roadmap, architecture, AI integration strategy
- [Consulting / Coaching](/consulting/coaching): Team and individual coaching on engineering practices — TDD, DDD, XP, CI/CD, pair programming
- [Manifesto](/about): The full story of why ioprodz exists and what it stands for
- [Blog](/blog): Notes from the engine room on AI engineering, practices, and shipping software that holds up

## Lab (not for sale — internal experiments)

- [Polysee](https://polysee.dev): The lab where Osmane stress-tests the methodology. Delivery intelligence platform.
- [SpecJest](https://github.com/osmanekalache/specjest): Open-source CLI bridging Gherkin feature files and Jest test skeletons.
